description: The company receives a notice that a customer with a large outstanding balance has filed for bankruptcy.

nodes.task_description: Receive the bankruptcy notification from the court.
Retrieve all open invoices for the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all amounts owed by the bankrupt customer.

nodes.task_description: Cease all standard collections activity for the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent flags the customer account to stop dunning notices.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a proof of claim to be filed with the bankruptcy court, detailing the amounts owed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the legal proof of claim document.
